meaning: <马来语>n.伊斯兰教律的法官(兼管伊斯兰教徒的结婚和离婚登记手续等)
examples: Only two-and-a-half weeks old but already weighing in at 40kg (88b), a baby hippopotamus swims alongside her mother, Kathi.
Only two-and-a-half weeks old but already weighing in at 40kg (88lb) a baby hippopotamus swims alongside her mother, Kathi.
Kathi-gesu, a professor at the Science University of Malaysia's school of mass communications.
